AtomCode vs Playground AI

Compare AtomCode and Playground AI: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

AtomCode
Playground AI
Category

⭐ 4.5
⭐ 4

30 days

daily

CodingPlan free, API separate
Free (500 images/day)

AtomCode

Huawei-backed open-source terminal AI coding assistant, competing with Claude Code. CodingPlan offers free 30-day access to GLM-5.1, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, Qwen3 series and more, running on Ascend chips with 5-hour rolling window metering.

Pros

  • ✓Pro tier free with GLM-5.1 top-tier model
  • ✓Rich model lineup covering top Chinese open-source LLMs
  • ✓Strong Agent capabilities, not just API wrapper
  • ✓No VPN needed, WeChat login
  • ✓Ascend chip deployment, low compute cost

Cons

  • ✗Limited daily free quotas, need to grab early
  • ✗Client-only, no third-party API access
  • ✗30-day validity, no renewal mechanism
  • ✗WeChat login only, no other login options

Key Features

GLM-5.1 #1 open-source coding model (Artificial Analysis benchmark)Pro tier: GLM-5.1, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, Qwen3 seriesLite tier: DeepSeek-V4-Flash, Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, MiniMax-M2.7Smart Agent loop: auto read, edit, run, search, verify8 built-in code tools: symbol indexing, call chain trackingSafe rollback: /undo one-click revert5-hour rolling window meteringRuns on Huawei Ascend chips, no VPN needed
View Details →

Playground AI

Free AI painting tool, 500 free images daily. Supports SDXL and PXL models, filters and editing.

Pros

  • ✓500 images/day is generous
  • ✓Good SDXL quality
  • ✓Strong editing features
  • ✓Very generous free tier

Cons

  • ✗Requires VPN for China
  • ✗Limited Chinese support
  • ✗Fewer community models than Liblib

Key Features

Text to ImageImage to ImageSDXL modelsFilters & EditingBatch generation
View Details →
